company: Badan Eksekutif Mahasiswa Institut Teknologi Sepuluh Nopember (BEM ITS)

roles.title: FullStack Website Director General Staf
tasks: Developed the first official BEM ITS website from scratch, serving as its web representative.
Built article, link shortener, and profile pages for the platform.

roles.title: Software Engineer - Ground Control Station Software
tasks: Co-developed a custom UAV mission planner, designed to compete with commercial closed-source mission planning systems, focusing on flexibility and research-driven features.
Engineered the end-to-end communication infrastructure between UAV, ground control station, and cloud services for reliable telemetry, command exchange, and real-time data transfer.
Designed and deployed live aerial video streaming from onboard UAV cameras using TCP/UDP protocols, integrating edge capture, transmission pipeline, and monitoring interface.
Implemented an AI-based aerial detection system using ONNX for inference, Flask for model serving, and ReactJS for visualization and control dashboard.

roles.title: Internship Programming Division
tasks: Learn the basics of robotic programming including image processing and ROS2 communication.

company: Society of Renewable Energy ITS (SRE ITS SC)

roles.title: Frontend Developer
tasks: Improved frontend codebase by implementing SOLID principles.

roles.title: Product Manager
tasks: Served as Product Manager, collaborating with two other PMs to lead a 32-member cross-functional team (backend, frontend, and UI/UX) in planning and executing feature sprints involving animation-heavy pages and transitions.

Successfully managed to make all features including seat ticketing page, 3 pace event page, ticket order form page, online ticket exchange, etc on time within a very fast paced event timeline based website with over 10k page visitors.
Developed real time leaderboard minigame on main event with over 50+ users.
